title: Neighborhood notes text container: smaller, consistent, centered
description: On the Neighborhood page, the notes text container should be smaller and consistent. Currently the numbered lists get progressively bigger. Fix: (1) Make all note containers the same smaller size. (2) Numbered lists should not grow larger. (3) Even though the list text is left-aligned, ensure the list block itself is centered within the container. Touches Neighborhood section component only — no overlap with other tasks.
